zh.Arundel, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾
zh.Ditton Manor, Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshi: 英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Arundel於1364年11月30日出生在英國素瑞邦藍時，他的父親Sir John FitzAlan14歲，母親Eleanor Mautravers19歲。他於1385年之前與Elisabeth Le Despenser結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1383年登記服兵役。他去世於1390年8月14日在英國賀特福爾米森登享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Arundel于1364年11月30日出生在英国素瑞邦藍时，他的父亲Sir John FitzAlan14岁，母亲Eleanor Mautravers19岁。他于1385年之前与Elisabeth Le Despenser结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1383年登记服兵役。他去世于1390年8月14日在英国賀特福爾米森登享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Arundel was born on 30 November 1364, in Buckland, Surrey, England, his father, Sir John FitzAlan, was 14 and his mother, Eleanor Mautravers, was 19. He married Elisabeth Le Despenser before 1385. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1383. He died on 14 August 1390, in Missenden, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Arundel est né le 30 novembre 1364, à Buckland, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir John FitzAlan, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Mautravers, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Le Despenser avant 1385. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1383. Il est décédé le 14 août 1390, à Missenden, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Arundel am 30. November 1364 in Buckland, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John FitzAlan 14 und seine Mutter Eleanor Mautravers 19. Er hat vor 1385 Elisabeth Le Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1383 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. August 1390 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Missenden, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundel è nato il il 30 novembre 1364 nel Buckland, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Sir John FitzAlan, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Mautravers, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Le Despenser prima del 1385. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1383. Morì il 14 agosto 1390, nel Missenden, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundelが1364年11月30日にイギリススリーブックランドで生まれた時，父Sir John FitzAlanは14歳，母Eleanor Mautraversは19歳であった。1385年以前にElisabeth Le Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1383年に兵役登録をした。彼は1390年8月14日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアミセンデンで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundel(이)가 1364년 11월 30일 영국 수리 벅랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John FitzAlan(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Mautravers(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1385년 이전 Elisabeth Le Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1383년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1390년 8월 14일 영국 허트퍼드실르 미센든에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.30 November 1364–14 August 1390: 30 de novembro de 1364–14 de agosto de 1390
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundel nasceu em 30 de novembro de 1364, em Buckland, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John FitzAlan, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Mautravers, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Le Despenser antes 1385. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1383. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1390, em Missenden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Arundel родился 30 ноября 1364 г. в местности буккланд, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John FitzAlan было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Mautravers, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Le Despenser перед 1385 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1383 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 августа 1390 г. в местности миссенден, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 25 лет.

es.30 November 1364–14 August 1390: 30 de noviembre de 1364–14 de agosto de 1390
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Arundel nació el 30 de noviembre de 1364, en Buckland, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John FitzAlan, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Eleanor Mautravers, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Le Despenser antes de 1385. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1383. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1390, en Missenden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años.
